name: @mithril/evals
description: promptfoo evaluation suites for Mithril's on-device local models (run through the real agent harness).

scripts.eval:html: mkdir -p _report && bunx promptfoo eval -c promptfooconfig.ts --output _report/report.json --output _report/report.html; code=$?; bun run report:overview; [ "$code" = "100" ] && code=0; exit $code
scripts.eval:subset: mkdir -p _report && bunx promptfoo eval -c promptfooconfig.ts --output _report/report.json --output _report/report.html; code=$?; bun run report:overview; [ "$code" = "100" ] && code=0; exit $code
scripts.report: mkdir -p _report && bunx promptfoo eval -c promptfooconfig.ts --output _report/report.json --output _report/report.html; code=$?; bun run report:overview; [ "$code" = "100" ] && code=0; exit $code
